zh.lifeSummary: 當Mélisende de Coucy於大約1120年出生在法國哈帕格時，她的父親Thomas de Marle-Coucy48歲，母親Mélisende de Crécy38歲。她和Hughes de Gournay至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1181年之後在英國英格蘭諾福爾可福萊格，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆波福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mélisende de Coucy于大约1120年出生在法国哈帕格时，她的父亲Thomas de Marle-Coucy48岁，母亲Mélisende de Crécy38岁。她和Hughes de Gournay至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1181年之后在英国英格兰諾福爾可福萊格，埋葬在法国皮卡迪索姆波福斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

en.lifeSummary: When Mélisende de Coucy was born about 1120, in Champagne, France, her father, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, was 48 and her mother, Mélisende de Crécy, was 38. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Hughes de Gournay. She died after 1181, in Flegg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Boves, Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mélisende de Coucy est née environ 1120, à Champagne, France, son père, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mélisende de Crécy, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Hughes de Gournay. Elle est décédée après 1181, à Flegg, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Boves, Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mélisende de Coucy um 1120 in Champagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Marle-Coucy 48 und ihre Mutter Mélisende de Crécy 38. Sie hatte mit Hughes de Gournay mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1181 in Flegg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Boves, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mélisende de Coucy è nata il circa 1120 nel Champagne, Francia, sua padre, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Mélisende de Crécy, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Hughes de Gournay. Morì dopo il 1181, nel Flegg, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mélisende de Coucyが約1120年にフランスチャンプアグンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Marle-Coucyは48歳，母Mélisende de Crécyは38歳であった。彼女はHughes de Gournayとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1181年以後にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフレググで死去し，フランスピカーディソンメボベスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mélisende de Coucy(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 챔파그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Marle-Coucy(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mélisende de Crécy(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Hughes de Gournay(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1181년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 플레그에서 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜 보브스에 묻혔다.

mn.Flegg, Norfolk, England: Flegg, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mélisende de Coucy nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Champagne, França, seu pai, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mélisende de Crécy, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Hughes de Gournay. Ela faleceu após 1181, em Flegg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Boves, Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mélisende de Coucy родилась около 1120 г. в местности чампагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Thomas de Marle-Coucy было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mélisende de Crécy, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Hughes de Gournay. Она умерла после 1181 г. в местности флег, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бовесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция.

sm.Abt 1120–Aft 1181: e tusa o le 1120–ina ua ma'ea le 1181

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mélisende de Coucy nació aproximadamente 1120, en Champagne, Francia, su papá, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mélisende de Crécy, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Hughes de Gournay. Murió después de 1181, en Flegg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia.
